body.title: 4.Skills.md: document all 49 skills with what+why
body.result: validated: 49/49 skills covered, glossary added, committed dc99a38d
body.description:
4.Skills.md currently documents 8 of 49 installed skills. The remaining ~41 are invisible to a new reader. This article is being distributed to Delta Dental colleagues starting Monday 2026-06-01 — missing skills will generate support questions. Expand the chapter to cover every skill in ~/.claude/skills/ with (a) what the skill does and (b) why that design was chosen.

**Affected files:** lab/docs/the_ownership_gap/4.Skills.md
**Design rules:** none apply (documentation work only)
**Scope boundary:** IN: add every skill not yet documented, with name/what/why. Keep the existing 8 entries and only improve them if there's a clear gap. Group skills logically (workflow core, audit suite, daily rituals, utility/one-offs). OUT: levers page (Akien editing separately), other chapters, new skill implementations.
**Completion criteria:** Every skill listed in ~/.claude/skills/ appears in 4.Skills.md with a description and a why-it-exists statement. decided (deprecated) is noted as deprecated. No skill from the installed list is absent from the article.
